char_status: High school student, Youngest of 花坂 family
char_overview: Youngest of 花坂 family. Natural-born 灵能者, unlike her bloodline brothers. High school senior in 福冈.
char_looks: 158cm Long black hair with pink-tinted ends, loosely braided to one side Pink eyes. High school sailor uniform. Pastel cardigans, knee-length pleated skirts. None. Uses 花舞 only for self-defense.
char_flaws: Avoids confrontation; Naive about the 灵能 world's darkness.; Twirls a cherry blossom petal when thinking.
char_abilities: 灵力回路-花舞: Manipulates petals through 灵力, controls ambient petals or constructs cherry blossom petals, forms barriers, screening clouds, or cutting edges.
char_mission: Finish high school. Decide whether to stay ordinary or enter the 灵能 world.
char_origin: Born when her brothers were in elementary school. Inherited no 花坂 bloodline, awakening as a natural 灵能者 instead. 花舞 surfaced around age two. Raised by mother away from 狩灵 affairs.

char_relationships.花坂 枫: Father, lost him at ten. Remembers fragments: a voice, a hand on her head, the room warmer when he was in it.
char_relationships.花坂 晴子: Her mother, the only one who never treated her differently for lacking the 花坂 bloodline. Tells her everything, hides nothing.
char_relationships.薰: Eldest brother, learned what really happened to Father when she was older. Senses there is more he does not say, and trusts his silence.
char_relationships.千乐: Second brother, raids his snack cabinet every chance she gets. Hears the worry beneath every joke, loves him for it.
